name: head
description: Output the first part of files

name: -c
--bytes
options.description: Print the first [numBytes] bytes of each file

name: -n
--lines
options.description: Print the first [numLines] lines instead of the first 10

name: -q
--quiet
--silent
options.description: Never print headers giving file names

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Always print headers giving file names
